headline: Why Blackstone (BX) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of alternative investment manager Blackstone (NYSE:BX) jumped 3.5% in the afternoon session after the company announced the final close of its record-breaking $6.3 billion life sciences fund.

headline: Blackstone Announces Final Close of Record $6.3 Billion Life Sciences Fund – the Largest Private Fund Dedicated to Life Sciences
summary: NEW YORK & CAMBRIDGE, Mass., March 30, 2026--Blackstone (NYSE: BX) today announced the final close of Blackstone Life Sciences VI ("BXLS VI"). BXLS VI was oversubscribed and closed at its hard cap of $6.3 billion of total capital commitments. It is the largest life sciences private fund ever raised and is nearly 40% larger than its predecessor vehicle.

It is the largest life sciences private fund ever raised and is nearly 40% larger than its predecessor vehicle.
